_comment: tasmota-venusos device configuration. Place this file at /data/tasmota_config.json

tasmota_AABBCC._comment: Key is the Tasmota device_id (topic name). Leave empty {} to use auto-discovered defaults.

0.name: Speed
0._comment_type9: Type 9 = Three-state switch. State values map to: 0=Off, 1=Low, 2=High (or whatever your three positions are).
0._comment_auto: auto=0 means the user controls state from the UI. auto=1 means your automation controls /State and the UI is read-only.
0._comment_relay_map: Maps each state value (0/1/2) to the relay commands sent over MQTT.

_comment_valid_types: valid_types is a bitmask. Bit 1 (=2) = toggle, bit 9 (=512) = three-state switch. 514 = toggle + three-state. Adjust per channel.
_comment_state_relay_map: state_relay_map lets you define which Tasmota POWER commands fire for each of the three states. Use POWER for single-relay devices, POWER1/POWER2/etc for multi-relay.
